function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "notify_guard", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["Three correlated events in 45s (vehicle approach + obscured plate + forced pry door) strongly point to active break-in", "All three priors are hand-set (n=0) — weak priors with no data backing, freeing adjustment", "Novel combination (zero precedents) but E3 door_forced with pry method is intrinsically high-confidence signal"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.85, "what_would_change_my_mind": "A guard reporting back that the dock door is intact and the vehicle was verified as a scheduled delivery would downgrade this to E1/E2. Guard video confirmation of no forced entry would change my assessment significantly."}
